text.div: intentionally left empty / not meaningful

tr.td: Macular edema and retinopathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Nonproliferative retinopathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Retinopathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Amlodipine (as amlodipine besylate) 2.5 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (2.5 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
Metformin hydrochloride 500 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
Alendronic acid (as alendronate sodium) 10 mg oral tablet
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Development of individualized plan of care
Assessment of health and social care needs
Assessment using AUDIT-C (Alcohol Use Disorders Identification Test - Consumption)

ul.li: Patient will understand and implement lifestyle modifications to help control blood pressure, including dietary changes, increased physical activity, and medication adherence.
Achieve and maintain LDL cholesterol below 70 mg/dL to reduce cardiovascular risk.
Maintain total cholesterol below 170 mg/dL.
Maintain triglycerides below 150 mg/dL.
Maintain HDL cholesterol above 50 mg/dL.
Maintain HbA1c at or below individualized target to reduce risk of diabetes complications.
Maintain blood pressure below 140/90 mmHg to reduce cardiovascular risk.
Maintain LDL cholesterol below 100 mg/dL to reduce cardiovascular risk.
Achieve or maintain a healthy body weight as part of diabetes self-management.
Maintain fasting blood glucose between 80 and 130 mg/dL.

tr.td: Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Aspartate aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Macular edema and retinopathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
